name: Aashutosh yadav
quote: Ritik consistently delivered features on time and handled both frontend and backend responsibilities effectively.

name: Ranjeet jha
quote: Ritik helped us customize, develop new dynamic sections for our store and fix key issues. Communication was smooth and work was delivered as expected.

name: Anurag yadav
quote: Worked with Ritik on multiple Shopify projects where I handled the UI/UX and he took care of the full development. From research and planning to implementing features and app integrations, he handled everything end-to-end. We collaborated on brands like Faura, Totimod, and Mishra Sports, and the execution was always smooth and reliable.
